mindoro_primary_reinit.track_label: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 NOAA reinit primary validation
mindoro_primary_reinit.shared_imagery_caveat: Both NOAA/NESDIS public products cite WorldView-3 imagery acquired on 2023-03-12, so the promoted March 13 -> March 14 row is a reinitialization-based public-validation pair with shared-imagery provenance rather than a fully independent day-to-day validation.
mindoro_primary_reinit.thesis_phase_title: Phase 3B Observation-Based Spatial Validation Using Public Mindoro Spill Extents
mindoro_primary_reinit.thesis_phase_subtitle: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 public spill-extent reinitialization validation
mindoro_primary_reinit.confirmation_interpretation: The separate phase1_mindoro_focus_pre_spill_2016_2023 Mindoro-focused drifter rerun selected the same recipe used by the stored B1 run (cmems_era5). It now serves as the active Mindoro-specific recipe-provenance lane for B1 without rewriting the original March 13 -> March 14 raw-generation history.
mindoro_primary_reinit.notes: Phase 3B observation-based spatial validation using public Mindoro spill extents now foregrounds the March 13 NOAA seed polygon and March 14 NOAA target through the completed OpenDrift R1 previous p50 branch. The base March 3 -> March 6 case definition remains frozen in config, this promoted row is authorized by a separate Phase 3B amendment, and the separate focused 2016-2023 Mindoro drifter rerun now supplies the active cmems_era5 recipe provenance without rewriting the stored run provenance.

mindoro_legacy_march6.track_label: Mindoro legacy March 6 sparse strict reference
mindoro_legacy_march6.notes: Legacy honesty-only row preserved for methodology honesty. The accepted WWF March 6 validation mask rasterized to only two observed ocean cells, so this remains valuable context but no longer serves as the canonical Mindoro validation row.

mindoro_legacy_broader_support.model_comparator: OpenDrift ensemble p50 appendix support union
mindoro_legacy_broader_support.notes: Legacy broader-support reference preserved for narrative context. This March 3-6 public observation union remains informative, but it should not be confused with the promoted March 13 -> March 14 primary validation track.

dwh_deterministic_event.notes: Scientific deterministic OpenDrift control using the frozen real historical forcing stack.

dwh_ensemble_p50_event.track_label: DWH ensemble extension and deterministic-vs-ensemble comparison
dwh_ensemble_p50_event.notes: Scientific ensemble p50 track; strongest DWH overall mean FSS across per-date and event-corridor rows.

dwh_ensemble_p90_event.track_label: DWH ensemble extension and deterministic-vs-ensemble comparison
dwh_ensemble_p90_event.notes: Scientific ensemble threshold track used for comparison against deterministic and p50.

dwh_pygnome_event.track_label: DWH PyGNOME comparator against the same DWH truth masks
dwh_pygnome_event.notes: Comparator only; DWH observed masks remain truth. PyGNOME wave/Stokes handling is not identical to the OpenDrift scientific stack and should be interpreted as a cross-model comparison, not as truth.

mindoro_crossmodel_top.current_source: same frozen hycom_era5 OpenDrift recipe currents as upstream reinit
mindoro_crossmodel_top.wind_source: same frozen hycom_era5 OpenDrift recipe winds as upstream reinit
mindoro_crossmodel_top.wave_stokes_status: same OpenDrift wave/Stokes stack reused from the completed March 13 -> March 14 reinit phase
mindoro_crossmodel_top.structural_limitations: This comparator reuses the completed March 13 -> March 14 OpenDrift branch p50 product rather than rerunning OpenDrift.

dwh_eventcorridor_top.source_semantics: date-composite public DWH observations; no invented sub-daily acquisition time

final_recommendation: Main text should emphasize Mindoro B1 as the March 13 -> March 14 NOAA reinit validation with an explicit caveat that both NOAA products cite March 12 WorldView-3 imagery, while DWH Phase 3C remains the rich-data transfer-validation success; comparative discussion should emphasize the March 13 -> March 14 Mindoro cross-model comparator and the DWH deterministic-vs-ensemble-vs-PyGNOME comparison; legacy/reference and appendix sections should retain the Mindoro March 6 sparse reference, the March 3-6 broader-support reference, recipe/init/source-history sensitivities, and any future DWH threshold or harmonization extensions.

mindoro_primary_validation_promotion.primary_track_label: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 NOAA reinit primary validation
mindoro_primary_validation_promotion.thesis_phase_title: Phase 3B Observation-Based Spatial Validation Using Public Mindoro Spill Extents
mindoro_primary_validation_promotion.thesis_phase_subtitle: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 public spill-extent reinitialization validation
mindoro_primary_validation_promotion.shared_imagery_caveat: Both NOAA/NESDIS public products cite WorldView-3 imagery acquired on 2023-03-12, so the promoted March 13 -> March 14 row is a reinitialization-based public-validation pair with shared-imagery provenance rather than a fully independent day-to-day validation.

dual_provenance_confirmation.confirmation_interpretation: The separate phase1_mindoro_focus_pre_spill_2016_2023 Mindoro-focused drifter rerun selected the same recipe used by the stored B1 run (cmems_era5). It now serves as the active Mindoro-specific recipe-provenance lane for B1 without rewriting the original March 13 -> March 14 raw-generation history.
dual_provenance_confirmation.thesis_phase_title: Phase 3B Observation-Based Spatial Validation Using Public Mindoro Spill Extents
dual_provenance_confirmation.thesis_phase_subtitle: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 public spill-extent reinitialization validation

recommended_final_chapter_structure: Phase 1 = Transport Validation and Baseline Configuration Selection
Phase 2 = Standardized Machine-Readable Forecast Product Generation
Phase 3A = Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 Cross-Model Comparator
Phase 3B1 = Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 NOAA Reinit Primary Validation
Phase 3B2 = Mindoro Legacy March 6 Sparse Strict Reference
Phase 3B3 = Mindoro Legacy March 3-6 Broader-Support Reference
Phase 3C = External Rich-Data Spill Transfer Validation (Deepwater Horizon 2010)
Phase 4 = Oil-Type Fate and Shoreline Impact Analysis
